author: vvo
subject: v2.1.0
body: # [2.1.0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.0.1...v2.1.0) (2017-01-04) ### Bug Fixes * **createInstantSearchManager:** drop outdated response (algolia/react-instantsearch#1765) ([1e4721e](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/1e4721e)) * **highlight:** highlight should work even if the attribute is missing (algolia/react-instantsearch#1791) ([f9d3f9e](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f9d3f9e)), closes [#1790](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1790) * **InfiniteHits:** better classname to loadmore btn (algolia/react-instantsearch#1789) ([da72f4d](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/da72f4d)) * **starRatings:** click on selected range doesn't unselect it (algolia/react-instantsearch#1766) ([690c38b](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/690c38b)) * **website:** broken demo links (algolia/react-instantsearch#1802) ([e1ed536](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/e1ed536)) * **widgets:** add 300px width for the default SearchBox (algolia/react-instantsearch#1803) ([1826ebb](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/1826ebb)) ### Features * **InfiniteHits:** Add class to load more button (algolia/react-instantsearch#1787) ([8c6d7b0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/8c6d7b0)) * **RefinementList, connectRefinementList:** allow to search for facet values ([cfee6f5](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/cfee6f5))
